creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Update to latest release

"I think everyone understands that it's getting better every day.  Or course, every nation that's got IEDS and drive-by shootings and suicide bombers definitely got some security issues" -LTC Gibler, Mosul, IQ 05MAY30

You Think?

diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/Makefile tor-devel/Makefile
--- tor-devel.orig/Makefile	2008-03-04 12:16:34.000000000 -0500
+++ tor-devel/Makefile	2008-03-04 12:17:07.000000000 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tor
-DISTVERSION=	0.2.0.19-alpha
+DISTVERSION=	0.2.0.21-rc
 CATEGORIES=	security net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.torproject.org/dist/ \
 		http://mirror.onionland.org/dist/
diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/distinfo tor-devel/distinfo
--- tor-devel.orig/distinfo	2008-03-04 12:16:34.000000000 -0500
+++ tor-devel/distinfo	2008-03-04 12:17:43.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

-SHA256 (tor-0.2.0.19-alpha.tar.gz) = 6a08d2a57f3efbe21cb1b5b4b29160b79ab53314eb18503744bfc899d65de137
-SIZE (tor-0.2.0.19-alpha.tar.gz) = 1532994
+MD5 (tor-0.2.0.21-rc.tar.gz) = cfedbbc30e687b427e0aa0d006fde0c6
